mcp.name: GEMINI Subagent Core
mcp.description: Core hub managing all GEMINI sub-agents with unified coordination, execution, and workflow capabilities
mcp.author: Rohi Rikman

resources.description: Defines all external and internal data sources accessible to MCP.

prompts.description: Contains base prompt templates for agent interactions and responses.

templates.default_instruction: You are a GEMINI sub-agent managed by the MCP. Follow context hierarchy and maintain structured reasoning.
templates.error_handling: If an action fails, log it and request clarification before retrying.

sampling.description: Controls sampling strategy for output balance.

logging.description: Defines centralized logging behavior for all MCP actions.

elicitation.description: Specifies the structure for eliciting additional data from agents or systems.

tools.description: Defines tools and execution utilities available to the MCP.

workflows.description: Defines task routing and sub-agent calling logic.
